name: Old Fashioned Raisin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Instant Tang Orange Drink (or any type of Instant Orange Breakfast Drink)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Roll out half of the pastry on a lightly floured surface and shape it into a 13-inch circle. Line a 9-inch pie plate with the pastry and trim the edge 1/2 inch beyond the rim.
3. In a saucepan, combine raisins, brown sugar, cornstarch, and orange drink mix. Stir in water and lemon juice. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens.
4. Remove from heat and stir in walnuts. Pour filling into pastry-lined pie plate and dot with butter.
5. Roll out remaining pastry to an 11-inch circle. Place top crust over filling and trim edge 1 inch beyond rim. Fold top crust under bottom crust and form a ridge. Crimp the edge and cut steam vents.
6. Bake in preheated oven for 30 minutes or until crust is golden brown and filling is bubbly. Cool on wire rack.
